message:
feat(http2): validate SETTINGS_ENABLE_PUSH + handle all RFC 7540 settings (bd-2c9t)

Add validation for SETTINGS_ENABLE_PUSH (id=0x2): reject values > 1
per RFC 7540 §6.5.2. Also add explicit no-op handling for
SETTINGS_MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS (id=0x4) and update the catch-all
comment to reference the RFC.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
